MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK, FA MOTION Ntc Of Hrg & Mtn For The Appointment Of A Receiver & Issuance Of A Prelim Injunction

No appearances.

There being no appearances the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff Washington Mutual Bank's Motion for Appointment of a Receiver & Issuance of a preliminary injunction was ordered CONTINUED to September 28, 2004, pursuant to the stipulation of the parties. Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Reported by Beldon Yee CSR# 2647. (302/REQ)
